pi_items.source: Explicit instruction in task.json description and dynamically setup via setup_task.sh SQL injection.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env enforce_part11_security_baselines task by confirming that the target user 'mrivera' and their initial account state are synthetically generated and explicitly managed via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL queries. Verified the exact required password minimum length (12), expiration days (90), and support email ('audit-support@clinical-trials.org') explicitly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
